subtasks.title: Implement indicator calculation pipeline
subtasks.details: Compute VWAP, EMA(9/21), RSI and additional derived features from streaming candles.
acceptance_criteria: Indicators available for all subscribed strikes each minute.
Unit tests for edge cases (low volume, startup period).
questions: Should EMA periods be globally fixed or per strategy?

subtasks.title: Implement Greeks engine
subtasks.details: Compute delta/gamma/theta/vega using configurable model assumptions and fallback behavior for missing inputs.
acceptance_criteria: Greeks table populated for CE/PE strikes.
questions: Do we support model switching (Black-Scholes vs approximation)?

subtasks.title: Implement OI and volume change processor
subtasks.details: Calculate OI change, volume spike, and momentum windows for ranking engine.
acceptance_criteria: Windowed deltas available in under 1 second after cycle close.
Anomaly detection flags outliers and bad ticks.
questions: Window lengths for OI/volume spike detection?

subtasks.title: Persist analytics outputs
subtasks.details: Store final metrics in PostgreSQL tables with proper indexing for recommendation queries.
acceptance_criteria: No duplicate rows per strike/time bucket.
questions: Retention policy for high-frequency analytics tables?
